title: tephrosia zollingeri
intro: Tephrosia zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's horsefly tree or zollinger's tephrosia, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Tephrosia zollingeri is traditionally prepared as a herbal remedy by drying and crushing the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to treat various ailments.
